creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Trying building ports/database/ruby-postgres and
ports/databases/ruby18-dbd_pg-0.1.1 and getting on both this error (also
when trying to install ruby-postgres via 'gem install ruby-postgres'):

/usr/ports/databases/ruby-dbd_pg
telesto# make
telesto# make install
===>  Installing for ruby18-dbd_pg-0.1.1
===>   ruby18-dbd_pg-0.1.1 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/dbi.rb - found
===>   ruby18-dbd_pg-0.1.1 depends on package: rubygem-ruby-postgres>=0 - not found
===>    Verifying install for rubygem-ruby-postgres>=0 in /usr/ports/databases/rubygem-postgres
===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
=> postgres-0.7.1.2006.04.06.gem is not in /usr/ports/databases/rubygem-postgres/distinfo.
=> Either /usr/ports/databases/rubygem-postgres/distinfo is out of date, or
=> postgres-0.7.1.2006.04.06.gem is spelled incorrectly.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/databases/rubygem-postgres.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/databases/ruby-dbd_pg.

Fix: 

Try installing above mentioned ports.
